actions.intent: Read the lower puppy as the water priority before chasing the safer target.
Use a safe setup clear that does not abandon the lower route.
Pay the crate route tax next to the lower puppy.
Keep dock pressure stable while the lower route opens.
Finish the lower route and extract the priority puppy first.
Pivot upward after the lower rescue is safe.
Use the opened board state to prepare the safer upper rescue.
Complete the upper rescue after the water-priority puppy.

notes: Designer golden for route-tax practice: pay the lower crate tax, rescue lower first, then pivot.
